span.p:
Stay on closed API
Re-evaluate quarterly

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Add serverless open-model
for long-tail workloads

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Single workload
>50M output tokens/day
with steady traffic?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gate 2: Specialization
Need capabilities unavailable
on serverless?

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Evaluate dedicated for
cost savings only

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Gate 3: Ownership
Named owner + capacity
for 6-10 eng-weeks?

color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Use managed dedicated
Baseten / Fireworks / Together
